bounded_protocol_steps: choose close, repair observability, localize signal, run larger bounded radius with explicit objective, or freeze protocol

decision_graph.BOUNDARY_OR_FAILURE_SIGNAL: review failure, repair only if supported
decision_graph.LARGER_RADIUS_CANDIDATE: run only as separate bounded unit with explicit objective
decision_graph.OBSERVABILITY_HEALTH_CONFIRMED: freeze protocol or choose explicit next objective

frozen_lessons: Do not treat larger radius as number-go-up.
Clean PASS traffic can still contain distinguishable receipt structure.
Receipt/reference volatility must be distinguished from semantic or structural signal.
Protected key-name references are not boundary crossings when materialization/inspection/mutation counters remain zero.
Close/freeze is valid after accepted volatile-only localization.
hard_guards: no queue reopening during observability review
no closed-group inspection unless explicitly authorized
no row payload materialization unless explicitly authorized
